title: humata seramensis
intro: Humata seramensis, also known as the Seram water-fern, is a type of aquatic fern native to Indonesia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing swelling, improving skin health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as herbal tea, capsules, or tinctures, allowing for various methods of consumption. In traditional medicine, the leaves of Humata seramensis are used to treat various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions.
